title: Request coalescing sdk node (Performance)
summary: Request coalescing sdk node — performance workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "request coalescing (sdk node)" against the Tinybox performance surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the performance workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
